type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The change in the reported Carbon Monoxide emissions at Coastland Annacis during 2015 was due to a higher stack test measurement, from changes in production levels, and the addition of a regenerative thermal oxidizer for emissions control from the new veneer dryer.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The change in the reported PM10 emissions at Coastland Annacis during 2015 was due to a lower stack test measurement, from changes in production levels, and the addition of a regenerative thermal oxidizer for emissions control from the new veneer dryer.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The change in the reported PM2.5 emissions at Coastland Annacis during 2015 was due to a lower stack test measurement, from changes in production levels, and the addition of a regenerative thermal oxidizer for emissions control from the new veneer dryer.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report

comments.comment: The emissions measured during stack testing increased to above the NPRI reporting threshold due in part to increased production, but mainly due to an updated stack gas analytical method for VOCs used by the source tester.

Other Part 5 VOC emissions for 2008 cannot be declared due to a lack of emission factors for a veneer dryer with a wet electrostatic precipitator control device.  Using emission factors for uncontrolled emissions results in overly conservative estimates.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Particulate emissions are based on source testing which is completed once per year.  The measured particulate discharge rate for that source test is used to estimate emissions for the whole year based on annual operating time.  Variations in test results will vary from year to year based on the different parameters that may exist during the test such as type of wood species, moisture content etc.

comments.comment: Non-methane VOC emissions are based on source testing which is completed once per year.  The measured particulate discharge rate for that source test is used to estimate emissions for the whole year based on annual operating time.  Variations in test results will vary from year to year based on the different parameters that may exist during the test such as type of wood species, moisture content etc.
